handoffBanner: Hand-to-Hand Exchange: Coordinate payments and handoffs safely via chat. Meet in public spaces!

slide1Desc: The ultimate marketplace built specifically for the Georgian cosplay and gaming community.
slide2Desc: Trade costumes, wigs, and custom props completely free with 0% transaction fees. Meet safely in local hubs!
slide3Desc: Build your artisan profile, earn trust medals, and turn your craftsmanship into total local earnings.

verificationSentTo: We sent a verification link to

photosOptional: optional — we'll use a placeholder if skipped
pricingBothOptions: You can offer both options at once.
toggleSaleRent: Toggle For Sale and/or For Rent.

usernameHint: This is your public handle visible to other users.

chatStartHint: Ask about availability, size, or shipping.
chatWarn_transfer: ⚠️ Heads-up — Kosmeo is a cash-only, hand-to-hand marketplace. Never transfer money via bank, card, or any app. Pay in person only, after inspecting the item.
chatWarn_shipping: ⚠️ Kosmeo doesn't support shipping or couriers. All exchanges happen face-to-face at a public meetup hub. If someone asks you to ship, that's a red flag.
chatWarn_offplatform: ⚠️ Keep all negotiations here in Kosmeo chat. Moving to another app removes your transaction record and your ability to report issues. Stay safe, stay here.
chatWarn_deposit: ⚠️ Never pay a deposit before meeting in person. Legitimate sellers on Kosmeo don't ask for advance payments. This is a common scam pattern — proceed with caution.
report_sheet_subtitle: What's going on? Select the reason that best describes the issue.
report_detail_placeholder: Describe what happened in your own words (optional but helpful)…
report_privacy_note: Your identity is kept confidential. Kosmeo reviews all reports within 48 hours.
report_done_desc: Thank you for helping keep Kosmeo safe. Our team will review this within 48 hours. The reported user will not know who filed this report.
defect_resolution_subtitle: Discover a problem after your meetup?
defect_step1_desc: Take clear photos and a short video of the defect right now, while you still have the item. Timestamp matters.
defect_step2_title: Contact the seller in Kosmeo chat
defect_step2_desc: Open the original conversation and send your photos. State the defect clearly and propose a resolution — a partial refund or return meetup.
defect_step3_title: Give the seller 48 hours to respond
defect_step3_desc: Most sellers resolve issues quickly to protect their rating. If they agree, arrange a follow-up meetup at the same public hub.
defect_step4_desc: After 48 hours with no reply, use the Report button in the chat header to flag the seller. Include your defect photos in the detail field.
defect_step5_desc: Our team will review your report, contact the seller, and — if the defect was hidden deliberately — apply a warning or suspend the account.
defect_step6_desc: After any outcome, leave an accurate review. Your rating protects the community from the same issue in future transactions.
termsNoticePrefix: By creating an account you agree to our
tos_pageSubtitle: Know your rights and how to trade safely
tos_safety_hero_desc: Kosmeo runs on hand-to-hand exchanges — no payment processor, no shipping, just two cosplayers meeting in person. These guidelines keep every meetup comfortable and fair.
tos_safety_s1_r1: Confirm all details (item condition, exact price, and meetup location) over Kosmeo chat before agreeing to anything.
tos_safety_s1_r2: Check the seller's trust tier and read their existing reviews before accepting a meetup.
tos_safety_s1_r3: Never share your home address, workplace, or school — always suggest a neutral public location.
tos_safety_s1_r4: Tell a friend or family member where you are going and who you are meeting.
tos_safety_s1_r5: Screenshot the listing and the chat before heading out, so you have a record of what was agreed.
tos_safety_s2_r1: Choose busy, well-lit public spaces — café entrances, mall atriums, metro station lobbies, or government office squares.
tos_safety_s2_r2: Bring a friend when possible, especially for high-value items.
tos_safety_s2_r3: Inspect the item thoroughly before handing over any payment. If it does not match the listing photos, you are free to walk away.
tos_safety_s2_r4: Count cash carefully in a safe location. Kosmeo recommends meeting near a working ATM so you can verify banknotes.
tos_safety_s2_r5: Do not transfer money via any app before physically receiving the item.
tos_safety_s3_r1: Any request to move the conversation off Kosmeo chat (WhatsApp, Telegram, etc.) before the deal is agreed.
tos_safety_s3_r2: Pressure to pay a deposit via bank transfer, card, or crypto before meeting.
tos_safety_s3_r3: A location that is private, secluded, or changes at the last minute.
tos_safety_s3_r4: Photos that look too professional or are found on a reverse image search.
tos_safety_s3_r5: Any deal that feels rushed or "too good to be true" — it probably is.
tos_safety_tip1: Photo-document the item at the meetup before and after the handoff.
tos_safety_tip2: All negotiations must stay in Kosmeo chat — this protects both parties.
tos_safety_tip3: A handshake and a smile go a long way. This is a community — treat every member with respect.
tos_safety_tip4: Leave an honest review after every transaction. Your feedback builds the trust layer that makes this marketplace work.
tos_hub_kutaisi: City Mall Kutaisi – food court level
tos_safety_trust_desc: Bronze, Silver, and Gold medals are earned through verified sales and community reviews — not purchased. A Gold seller has completed many transactions with consistently positive feedback. Always check the tier badge on a profile before agreeing to meet.
tos_t1_p1: Kosmeo ("Platform") is a peer-to-peer marketplace built for the Georgian cosplay and gaming community. It is operated as a community service and does not act as a seller, buyer, broker, or auctioneer in any transaction.
tos_t1_p2: By registering an account or browsing the Platform you agree to these Terms of Service and our Safety Guidelines. If you do not agree, please do not use Kosmeo.
tos_t2_r1: Minimum age to register is 16 years old. Users aged 16–17 require explicit permission from a parent or legal guardian before creating an account.
tos_t2_r2: You are responsible for keeping your password secure. Any activity that occurs under your account is your responsibility.
tos_t2_r3: You agree to provide accurate information during registration and keep your profile up to date.
tos_t2_r4: Kosmeo may suspend or permanently ban accounts that violate these Terms, without prior notice, where circumstances require it.
tos_t3_p1: All transactions on Kosmeo are hand-to-hand exchanges conducted in person between two private individuals. Kosmeo is not a party to any transaction and does not hold, process, or escrow money.
tos_t3_r1: Prices are set by the seller in Georgian Lari (₾) and are final once agreed in chat.
tos_t3_r2: The listing must accurately describe the item's condition, size, and any known defects. Misrepresentation may result in account suspension.
tos_t3_r3: Kosmeo does not guarantee that any transaction will be completed, or that items match their descriptions. All buyers take personal responsibility for verifying items at the point of handoff.
tos_t4_p1: The following are strictly prohibited on Kosmeo:
tos_t4_r1: Listing counterfeit goods, stolen property, weapons, or any item whose sale is restricted or illegal under Georgian law.
tos_t4_r2: Harassment, hate speech, or threatening behaviour toward any community member.
tos_t4_r3: Attempting to conduct transactions outside the Platform in order to evade the review system or community standards.
tos_t4_r4: Creating fake reviews, manipulating ratings, or operating multiple accounts to game trust tiers.
tos_t5_p1: Kosmeo provides the Platform "as is" and disclaims all warranties to the extent permitted by law. In particular:
tos_t5_r1: Kosmeo is not liable for any loss arising from a transaction, including non-delivery, item condition, or fraud between users.
tos_t5_r2: Disputes between buyers and sellers are the responsibility of the parties involved. We encourage both sides to document all communications.
tos_t5_r3: If you believe a crime has been committed, please contact Georgian law enforcement (dial 112) immediately.
tos_t6_p1: The community review system is the backbone of trust on Kosmeo. Users agree to the following:
tos_t6_r1: Reviews must be honest and relate to a genuine transaction. False or retaliatory reviews violate these Terms.
tos_t6_r2: Trust tiers (Bronze / Silver / Gold) are calculated automatically based on completed sales and average rating. Kosmeo reserves the right to adjust the calculation formula.
tos_t6_r3: Kosmeo may remove reviews that are fraudulent, abusive, or unrelated to a real exchange on the Platform.
tos_t7_p1: All Platform content, including the Kosmeo name, logo, and interface design, is the property of Kosmeo and may not be reproduced without written permission.
tos_t7_p2: By uploading photos or content, you grant Kosmeo a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to display that content on the Platform for the duration of your listing.
tos_t8_p1: Kosmeo collects only the data necessary to operate the Platform. Specifically:
tos_t8_r1: Your email address is used only for account verification, password recovery, and essential Platform notifications.
tos_t8_r2: Your city is displayed publicly on your listings to help buyers find local items.
tos_t8_r3: Kosmeo does not sell your personal data to third parties.
tos_t9_p1: Kosmeo may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Platform after a change is posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. Significant changes will be announced in-app.
tos_t10_p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Georgia (საქართველო). Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Tbilisi, Georgia.
tos_t10_p2: These Terms are provided in English and Georgian. In the event of any inconsistency, the Georgian-language version shall prevail.
tos_contactLine: Questions about these Terms? Email us:
beFirstToList: Be the first to list a cosplay item for your community!
ageConfirmCheckbox: I confirm that I am at least 16 years old. If I am 16–17 years old, I have permission from my parent or legal guardian to use Kosmeo.
ageConfirmRequired: You must confirm your age before creating an account.
tos_t2_r5: By creating an account you confirm that you meet the minimum age requirement, and that a parent or legal guardian has given permission if you are aged 16–17.
tos_t4_r5: Any content involving minors that is exploitative, abusive, or sexualized is strictly prohibited and will result in permanent account suspension.
tos_safety_s4_r1: Meet only in busy, well-lit public places — never at a private residence.
tos_safety_s4_r2: Bring a parent, guardian, or trusted adult to every meetup whenever possible.
tos_safety_s4_r3: Never agree to meet at a location chosen by the other party if it feels secluded or unfamiliar.
tos_safety_s4_r4: Never pay a deposit or transfer money before physically receiving the item.
tos_safety_s4_r5: Keep all communication inside Kosmeo — do not share personal contact details with other users.
newToKosmeoDesc: Learn how to trade safely and avoid common scams.
